meta.title: Rhythmic Gymnastics Club Management Software in Spain | Zaltyko
meta.description: Manage your federated rhythmic gymnastics club with Zaltyko. Full control over athletes, categories, levels 1-10, 5 apparatus, and RFEG licenses.

hero.headline: Manage your federated rhythmic gymnastics club with ease
hero.subheadline: Full control over RFEG athletes, official categories, levels 1-10, Copa de España and licenses. Manage all 5 apparatus: rope, ball, clubs, hoop and ribbon.

federation.name: Real Federación Española de Gimnasia (RFEG)
competitions: Campeonato de España en Edad Escolar

painPoints.generic: Managing federations, licenses and apparatus equipment in spreadsheets takes hours you could spend training. Information gets lost between offices.
painPoints.specific: Renewing RFEG licenses, managing gymnastic equipment (ropes, hoops, balls, clubs, ribbons), tracking technical levels 1-10 and required exercises per category.
